antipattern.symptom: Every entry attitude=supporter; surprise blocker emerges at month 2.
antipattern.fix: Reviewer challenges entries; cite specific behaviours when supporter is claimed.

antipattern.symptom: Closed entry's ID reused for new stakeholder; engagement-diff history corrupted.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated IDs as row numbers.
antipattern.fix: Increment monotonic ID counter; never reuse.

antipattern.symptom: Strategy across 10 rows reads 'regular brief' verbatim.
antipattern.fix: Min-length + per-stakeholder specificity check at review.

antipattern.symptom: Last review 5 months ago; org has changed.
